intent: To support the diverse needs of occupants and increase widespread usability of spaces

requirements.label: Accessible Routes
requirements.description: Accessible routes must be provided throughout the building

requirements.label: Ramps
requirements.description: Ramps must be provided as alternatives to stepped changes in level

requirements.label: Exterior Building Entrances
requirements.description: Regular exterior building entrances must be accessible

requirements.label: Door Minimum Width
requirements.description: Minimum clear width of doors must be 32 inches (0.86 meters) to allow passage

requirements.label: Accessible Reception and Counters
requirements.description: Reception desks and counters must include a front-approach, wheelchair-accessible section

requirements.label: Automatic Door Operation
requirements.description: Doors should support wave-to-open, vertical hand press, or foot press activation

requirements.label: Mobility Device Space in Meeting Rooms
requirements.description: Meeting spaces must accommodate mobility devices for at least 10% of occupants

requirements.label: Inclusive Fitness Facilities
requirements.description: Fitness facilities must include inclusive equipment and activities

requirements.label: Alternate Accessible Routes (Stair Alternatives)
requirements.description: Alternate accessible routes must be provided instead of or in addition to stairs

requirements.label: Non-Slip Flooring
requirements.description: Flooring surfaces must be non-slip throughout accessible routes and spaces

requirements.label: Area Rug Secured
requirements.description: Area rugs must be fixed/secured to prevent trip hazards

requirements.label: Glazing Visual Indication
requirements.description: Full-height glazing must have visual indication or railings at appropriate height

requirements.label: Audible and Visual Alerts
requirements.description: Emergency and notification systems must provide both audible and visual alerts

requirements.label: Visual Contrast Between Walls and Floors
requirements.description: Sufficient visual contrast must exist between wall and floor surfaces to aid navigation

requirements.label: Warning Indicators
requirements.description: Visual, tactile, and photoluminescent warnings must be provided at hazard locations

requirements.label: Lactation Room
requirements.description: A dedicated lactation room must be provided

requirements.label: All-Gender Single-User Restroom
requirements.description: At least one fully accessible all-gender single-user restroom must be provided

requirements.label: Adult Changing Facility
requirements.description: An adult changing station must be provided, either in a family restroom or in both men's and women's restrooms

requirements.label: Multilingual Signage
requirements.description: Signage must be provided in any language spoken by more than 5% of the building population

requirements.label: Clear Wayfinding Signage
requirements.description: Wayfinding signage must clearly indicate exits, entrances, and major functions

requirements.label: Non-Text Diagrams and Symbols
requirements.description: Non-text diagrams and universal symbols must be used alongside text in signage

requirements.label: Braille, Visual, and Audio Cues
requirements.description: Navigation support must include braille, visual cues, and audio cues

requirements.label: Pattern and Colour Blocking for Key Access
requirements.description: Patterns and colour blocking must be used to identify key access points and zones

requirements.label: Haptic and Tactile Maps
requirements.description: Haptic or tactile maps must be provided to support navigation for users with visual impairments

metadata.notes: Ground truth document for structured extraction. All requirements are mandatory unless otherwise noted. Percentages and measurements are minimum thresholds.
